creator: cjr@cruwe.de
text:
Glassfish is the reference implementation for a Java EE application server. There is no port and users are forced to do a manual installation. The attached patch attempts to redress this situation.

Fix: Attached port installs the open source edition of the Glassfish application server to $PREFIX/glassfish-3.1.2.2 complete with rc.d-integration.

Obviously I could not run a redports-test, the port installs and uninstalls cleanly on my amd64 FreeBSD 9.0 machines.

Patch attached with submission follows:
